name: solo
description: Solopreneur OS — now with team support (1 to 8 people). Solo, duo, and team modes: capacity planning, revenue split, partnership health. New: time tracking (real effective hourly rates), quarterly goal tracking, subcontractor management, standup agent, team-health agent, year-end command. FR legal compliance (TVA micro-entrepreneur, art. 293 B, late payment penalties). Built on PARA methodology. Bilingual FR/EN.

core-identity.description: Business identity foundations — profile, voice, audience (ICP + persona unified), positioning, team setup, and file organisation. Always pre-loaded.

client-work.description: Full client lifecycle — onboarding, discovery, proposals, scope management, and contracts.

revenue-ops.description: Financial operations — invoicing (TVA-compliant), expenses, financial health (real P&L with subcontractor costs), retainers, and pricing strategy.

sales-growth.description: Lead generation and sales — pipeline, outreach, company research, competitive analysis, and landing pages.

product-build.description: Product development — orchestration, PRDs, user stories, design briefs, problem statements, and personas.

research-validate.description: Market research and validation — user discovery, market sizing, journey mapping, and idea testing.

diagnostics.description: Scored diagnostic assessments — build, run, and analyze diagnostics with Tally integration.

operations.description: Business operations — weekly reviews, project management, capacity planning, health advisors, and launch planning.

business-ops.description: Business operations layer — time tracking, quarterly goals, and subcontractor management. Unlocks real margins and actual hourly rates.

team-mode.description: Team features — activated in duo/team mode. Capacity planning across members, revenue attribution, partnership health.
